data.title: Rumble Shares Are Up Today: What You Need To Know
data.description: Shares of Rumble Inc. (NASDAQ: RUM) are trading higher Friday. Late Thursday, President-elect Donald Trump stated in a post that David Sacks, a member of Rumble's board since June 2023, will assume the role of "White House A.I. & Crypto Czar" in the upcoming administration. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Apple Unusual Options Activity For December 06
Lululemon's Strong Earnings and Share Buyback Push Analysts to Increase Price Forecast
data.description: Analysts raise Lululemon's price targets, citing strong Q3 results, international growth, product innovation, and future expansion opportunities.

data.title: HPE AI Servers and Cloud Strength Lead the Charge: Analysts Raise Price Forecasts
data.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE: HPE) reports Q4 results, beating estimates with EPS of 58 cents and sales of $8.46B. Analysts raise price targets and expect growth from AI servers and recovery in traditional servers.

data.title: Broadcom Notches Strongest Session In 3 Months: Why Seasonal Trends May Bolster Year-End Gains
data.description: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) surged 5%, outperforming the semiconductor sector thanks to its innovative 3.5D XDSiP technology and favorable seasonal trends.
